# Science

Using AI to increase the pace of scientific progress is a core part of Anthropic’s mission. Here, we’ll explore what this really looks like. We’ll share work happening inside and outside Anthropic, our collaborations with external researchers and labs, and practical workflows for scientists using AI in their research.

Science

## Making Claude a chemist

We’re working with world-class synthetic, computational, and analytical chemists to make Claude better at chemistry. In this post, we share our first work as part of this effort, in which Anthropic chemist, David Kamber, examines how Claude performs on a chemist’s most common analytical input, an NMR spectrum.

Read more
